ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "snowfall" REAL /* Snowfall measurement */,
  "temperature_avg" REAL /* Average temperature */,
  "temperature_max" REAL /* Maximum temperature */,
  "temperature_min" REAL /* Minimum temperature */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data was collected */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the data was collected */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the station is located */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the station */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_elevation FOREIGN KEY ("elevation") REFERENCES elevations ("elevation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_day FOREIGN KEY ("day") REFERENCES days ("day_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_month FOREIGN KEY ("month") REFERENCES months ("month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of station (e.g., ground-based, satellite-based) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elevations" (
  "elevation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each elevation */,
  "elevation_value" INTEGER /* Elevation value */,
  "elevation_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the elevation (e.g., meters, feet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("elevation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_value" INTEGER /* Month the data was collected */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "days" (
  "day_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each day */,
  "day_value" INTEGER /* Day the data was collected */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of accessing the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
